description: Package accumulated findings into a handoff document delivered as Word (.docx) — what they need to know, not what happened. Markdown source on disk + professional document delivery.
usage: onboard, handoff, brief someone, bring up to speed, context document, new team member, handoff doc

target.description: The project, domain, or topic to create a handoff for

audience.description: Who is being onboarded — new hire, contractor, AI system, executive, partner

depth.description: Depth: quick (1-page), standard (comprehensive reference), deep (includes rationale for every decision)
